title: P0.2 — invoice amounts are server-calculated (browser amounts never trusted)
business_reason: The generated invoice create schema/form accepted gross_amount, net_payable_amount, balance_due (and a typed invoice_number) from the browser, violating finance spec rules amounts_server_calculated + browser_amount_never_trusted. A client could submit any total.
brain_skills: Skills: 08 Security (never trust the client for money), 02 Data Model. Brain: monetary integrity is non-negotiable.

param_14.question: Compute invoice money fields server-side from trusted inputs.
param_14.answer: New kernel hook computeOnCreate(table, row) (server/lib/createCompute.ts) derives invoice_number + gross/discount/tax/commission/net/amount_paid/balance from confirmed_student_count x price_per_student (gross = price*count; net = gross - discount + tax; balance = net - 0). createModuleRecord merges it AUTHORITATIVELY after building the row. gen_modules SERVER_COMPUTED excludes the computed fields from createSchema and COMPUTE_INPUTS force-includes the trusted inputs (confirmed_student_count was previously dropped by the _count rule); gen_ui mirrors this so the form shows only the two inputs.
param_14.security_implications: Browser can no longer set any monetary total or the invoice number; both are server-authoritative. Double protection: stripped from the schema AND overwritten by computeOnCreate.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: discount/tax/commission currently default to 0 unless provided; a pricing-policy source (config/admin_settings) for tax/commission rates is a P1 finance refinement. Payment amounts (finance_payments) follow the same pattern when their create path is built in P1.
param_14.assumptions: net = gross - discount + tax; commission is recorded but does not reduce net payable to the company.

principles_pass.P0.6: generic computeOnCreate hook + SERVER_COMPUTED/COMPUTE_INPUTS registries — reusable by any computed entity

functional: computeOnCreate: gross=count*price, net=gross-discount+tax, balance=net, INV- code; ignores browser-supplied totals; no-op for other tables (unit create_compute 3/3)
security_owasp: A08: client gross/net/balance/invoice_number ignored — server computes

verification: tsc clean; unit 165/165 (create_compute 3/3); invoice form now collects only confirmed_student_count + price_per_student.

known_followups.P1_finance: pricing-policy rates for tax/commission; finance_payments amount computation; invoices are also created by the billing workflow (the form is a manual/admin path).
